input.content: Search X for posts between 2026-07-13 and 2026-07-20 from these accounts: @verdikta19633. Focus on launches, announcements, and any brag about a security fix merged into another project. For each: @handle, full text, date, exact engagement counts (likes, retweets, replies; 0 if unknown), and the direct link https://x.com/handle/status/ID. Skip retweets of others.
